meaning: adj.在小路边的,小径一侧的 沿山路的
examples: This is our highest capacity pot set with the ability to feed the trailside masses.
It is an exceptional trailside restaurant, open lunch and dinner, with upscale American comfort food-European alpine fusion.
Walking along the trailside, annoyed at my cold, wet mission, I suddenly noticed a profusion of orange and yellow bell-shaped blooms growing on dwarf rhododendron bushes.
